recommendations.title: Raid
recommendations.overview: After receiving an anonymous tip, a tax officer leads a raid on the mansion of the most powerful figure in Lucknow, a member of parliament who has been evading income tax for years.

recommendations.title: Io sono Tempesta
recommendations.overview: To avoid jail, a tax-dodging businessman is sentenced to a year of community service in a homeless shelter.

recommendations.title: Fantomas vs. Scotland Yard
recommendations.overview: In the third and final episode of the trilogy, Fantômas imposes a head tax on the rich, threatening to kill those who do not comply.

recommendations.title: Squid Game: Fireplace
recommendations.overview: Come share a toast in the Front Man's lair — but tread carefully, for you’re playing with fire.

recommendations.title: The Overtaxed
recommendations.overview: Mr. Pezzella owns and operates a well-established luxury-clothing store. He does not like and does not consider it right to pay taxes and therefore uses a tax consultant to be able to evade more taxes.

recommendations.title: Joe's Apartment
recommendations.overview: A nice guy has just moved to New York and discovers that he must share his run-down apartment with a couple thousand singing, dancing cockroaches.

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.

recommendations.title: 2 or 3 Things I Know About Her
recommendations.overview: As the city of Paris and the French people grow in consumer culture, a housewife living in a high-rise apartment with her husband and two children takes to prostitution to help pay the bills.

recommendations.title: Lagaan: Once Upon a Time in India
recommendations.overview: The year is 1893 and India is under British occupation. In a small village, the tyrannical Captain Russell has imposed an unprecedented land tax on its citizens. Outraged, Bhuvan, a rebellious farmer, rallies the villagers to publicly oppose the tax.

recommendations.title: Bird People
recommendations.overview: An overstressed American businessman and a French chambermaid make a connection at an airport hotel in Paris.
